india.title: Chernobyl fuel facility hit: Nuclear fears resurface, Kyiv says Russian attack ‘deliberate'
india.summary: A Russian drone struck a spent nuclear fuel storage facility in Ukraine's Chornobyl exclusion zone, officials reported. While authorities confirmed radiation levels remained normal, President Zelenskyy condemned the attack as a deliberate act of recklessness targeting critical infrastructure. This incident adds to a pattern of Russian actions endangering nuclear safety, with Kyiv accusing Moscow of systemic nuclear blackmail.

india.title: 100 days on, Ali Khamenei remains unburied: What's delaying the funeral of Iran's longest-serving supreme leader?
india.summary: Over 100 days after his death in a US-Israel strike, Iran's supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has not been buried.
